creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186834
isync-1.3.0.diff

isync 1.3.0 just got released earlier today: https://sourceforge.net/projects/isync/files/isync/1.3.0/

The attached patch updates the port accordingly.  Perl is now required for a script run during the build process.

Should there be an entry in UPDATING about the SubFolders option, which is now required for MaildirStores with subfolders?  mbsync already warns at runtime when the option is missing.

"poudriere testport" on amd64 11.1-RELEASE succeeds cleanly.
